title: Yakushima Bus
subtitle: Trilingual bus & ferry guide
narration: This is Yakushima Bus — a free trilingual bus and ferry guide for Yakushima Island. Official PDF data. No app, no login.
subtitleZh: 屋久岛免费三语公交与上岛交通查询 · 官方 PDF · 无需安装

title: Next departure
subtitle: Presets · countdown · JST
narration: Pick origin and destination — or tap a preset route. Next departure, live countdown, Japan time clock. Swap direction in one tap.
subtitleZh: 选站或点常用区间 · 下一班与倒计时 · 一键对调方向

title: Full timetable
subtitle: Day types · operators
narration: Full timetable: weekday, Saturday, holidays. Two operators, color-coded. Filter upcoming buses only.
subtitleZh: 平日 / 周六 / 假日 · 两家运营商分色 · 可只看此后班次

title: Trilingual
subtitle: UI & stop search
narration: UI in Japanese, Chinese, or English. Search stops in any of the three — matches the sign at the stop.
subtitleZh: 界面日中英切换 · 站名三语搜索与站牌一致

title: Routes & fares
subtitle: Map · fare lookup
narration: Routes page: embedded official map — zoom in-page. Look up adult one-way fare between any two stops.
subtitleZh: 官方路线图页内缩放 · 任意两站成人单程票价

title: Island access
subtitle: Jetfoil · ferry · fares
narration: Access page: jetfoil and ferry times, fares from Kagoshima.
subtitleZh: 上岛页：高速船与渡轮时刻、鹿儿岛出发票价

title: yakushimabus.com
subtitle: Everything before you board
subtitleZh: yakushimabus.com — 上车前查这一站就够
